checks.name: catalog-visualizer-contract-alignment
checks.details: Catalog handoff now uses hero plus gallery references only, publish readiness remains hero-driven, and catalog DTOs no longer rely on texture-era asset roles.

checks.name: prisma-schema-and-client
checks.details: WrapImage now includes Cloudinary authority/media fields, the migration is applied, and Prisma Client was regenerated against the updated schema.

checks.name: unit-tests
checks.details: Included in `pnpm validate`; 43 files and 148 tests passed.

checks.name: build
checks.details: `pnpm build` passed after regenerating Prisma Client against the updated WrapImage schema.

checks.name: e2e
checks.details: `pnpm test:e2e --project=chromium --reporter=line` passed with 27 passing tests and 2 skipped tests.

checks.name: catalog-legacy-row-posture
checks.details: No active local `/uploads/wraps/**` rows remain; 19 soft-deleted local-path rows remain documented for remediation, and 4 wraps remain hidden pending manual hero/gallery re-upload.

checks.name: visualizer-mask-aware-unit-tests
checks.details: `pnpm test:unit` passed with 44 files and 150 tests after mask-aware inpaint refactor.

checks.details: `pnpm typecheck` passed with no TypeScript errors.

checks.name: visualizer-lint

checks.name: visualizer-prisma-validate
checks.details: `pnpm prisma:validate` passed and Prisma schema remained valid.

checks.name: catalog-visualizer-browser-workflow
checks.details: Integrated-browser verification created Inferno, uploaded the hero asset, confirmed visualizer-ready selection, uploaded the customer vehicle image, and generated a persisted preview result with status=complete. The persisted preview metadata also confirmed the result came from deterministic_fallback rather than the HF path.

checks.name: visualizer-space-client-typecheck
checks.details: `pnpm typecheck` passed after updating lib/visualizer/huggingface/space-client.ts and installing @gradio/client.

checks.name: visualizer-hf-only-unit-tests
checks.details: `pnpm vitest run tests/vitest/unit/lib/visualizer/actions/process-visualizer-preview.test.ts tests/vitest/unit/lib/visualizer/actions/create-visualizer-preview.test.ts` passed after removing deterministic fallback execution from the action pipeline.

checks.name: visualizer-hf-only-lint
checks.details: `pnpm lint` passed after the HF-only visualizer refactor.

checks.name: visualizer-public-hf-space-inference
checks.details: A direct `@gradio/client` call to the public `black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev` Space succeeded with the real source vehicle photo plus three Inferno reference images, confirming the new default HF-only backend is callable and returns an edited image result.
